name: PRD Optimizer
description: Iteratively evaluate and improve PRDs and requirements documents through autonomous score-refine loops.
longDescription:
Runs autonomous test-score-refine loops on any PRD, requirements doc, or plan. Builds a **10-14 question** scoring checklist across **5 dimensions**: Internal Consistency, Completeness, Actionability, Gap Detection, and Self-Consistency.

Each round: pick the weakest failing check, apply one targeted fix, re-score all checks, keep if improved or revert if not. Fixes cross-reference asymmetry, terminology drift, status contradictions, missing error paths, and unresolved questions autonomously — asks the user only for new product decisions.

Includes a live `dashboard.html` with score history chart, checklist status, and changelog. Supports **4 modes**: full optimization, audit-only, focused dimension, and re-score watch.
